task.title: SC-12 真页 backend · AnonFilter (HandlerInterceptor) + AnonTokenService.verifyAnonToken + PATCH /api/anon/session/{id}/consent · 把 T01 mint 的 anonToken 真正在网关验签 + biz F02 consent 步落地 · 7 IT testcase

audit_gate: audit.js v3 7 dims · 同前 || 红线: Backend IT ≥ 5 testcase 全绿 · AnonFilter 真拦截缺/伪 X-Anon-Token + PATCH consent 真写 DB consent_at/consent_type

context.scenario:
SC-12 真页 backend 第 2/N 片 · T01 已落 POST /api/anon/session mint + GuestSession entity. 本 task 把 anonToken 的认证层闭环 + 落 biz F02 'consent 勾选' 这一步真接口.

本 task 范围:
  - AnonTokenService.verifyAnonToken(authValue): Optional<Long> — 验签 HS256 + iss/aud + 校验 sub 前缀必须 'anon:' + 返回 guestSessionId
  - AnonFilter (Spring HandlerInterceptor · 注册到 WebMvcConfigurer): 拦截 /api/anon/** · 白名单跳过 POST /api/anon/session (mint 入口本身不能要 token) · 提取 X-Anon-Token + verify · 失败 401 ANON_TOKEN_INVALID · 成功把 guestSessionId 写 HttpServletRequest attribute 'anonGuestSessionId'
  - PATCH /api/anon/session/{id}/consent: 验 path id == request.attribute.anonGuestSessionId (防越权) · body {consentType ∈ 1/2/3} · 更新 DB consent_at=now + consent_type + status=1 CONSENTED (T01 注释里写 INIT=0/CONSENTED=1 · 但 DDL 实际 enum 是 0 CREATED → 1 ANALYZING · 看 SC-12-T01 spec drift surface · 本 task 复核 DDL 后选最贴近的)

关键复用: T01 落的 AnonTokenService.signingKey (constructor 注入) + GuestSessionRepository · 不重写.
context.spec_path: design/system/pages/P-GUEST-CAPTURE-guest-capture.spec.md §5 (X-Anon-Token 用法) + §6 状态机 (CONSENT_PENDING → UPLOADING transition) + biz §2B.13 F02 (consent 写库)
biz_refs: biz §2B.13 SC-12 F02 (consent 勾选 → consent_at 写库 · consent_type 必填 · 不勾选不进 UPLOADING)
biz §4.10 guest_session.consent_at + consent_type SMALLINT (1 ADULT / 2 MINOR_WITH_GUARDIAN / 3 MINOR_NO_GUARDIAN)
biz §2A.3.2 P-GUEST-CAPTURE Consent Card (勾选前 Shutter disabled)
P-GUEST-CAPTURE spec.md §5 #1-#5 (X-Anon-Token 用于所有非 mint 端点 · 401 ANON_TOKEN_EXPIRED 标准错误码)
api_contracts_in_scope: PATCH /api/anon/session/{id}/consent (NEW) · header X-Anon-Token (Bearer NOT required · 直接 token 值) · body {consentType: 1|2|3} → 200 {consentAt, consentType} · 401 token 无效 · 403 session_id 不匹配 · 404 session 不存在
AnonFilter (Spring HandlerInterceptor) 拦截 /api/anon/** · 白名单 POST /api/anon/session
api_contracts_out_of_scope: Quota / rate limit 429 QUOTA_EXHAUSTED (T06 范围)
前端 P-GUEST-CAPTURE 真页 (T05 范围)
scope_in: 0. 复核 V20260421_02__init_anonymous.sql guest_session.status enum 实际定义 (T01 spec drift surface 提到 DDL 0 CREATED / 1 ANALYZING / 2 RESULT_READY / 3 FAILED / 4 CLAIMED / 9 EXPIRED) · 决策: 本 task PATCH consent 不动 status (因为 ANALYZING 与 CONSENTED 概念冲突 · 状态机由 T03 presign + T04 analyze 推进) · 只写 consent_at + consent_type

(a) 新增 public Optional<Long> verifyAnonToken(String anonTokenHeaderValue): 验签 HS256 + iss/aud · 检查 sub 必须以 'anon:' 开头 · 返回 sub 后的 Long(guestSessionId) · 任何失败 (null/blank/expired/wrong-issuer/wrong-prefix) 返 Optional.empty() · 与 JwtVerifier 同模式 (debug 日志不抛)
(b) 复用现有 signingKey + expectedIssuer + expectedAudience · 不重新构造
- 白名单 skip (return true): path == '/api/anon/session' AND method == POST
- opt.empty → 写 401 response body {code:'ANON_TOKEN_INVALID', message:'Invalid or missing X-Anon-Token'} (application/json · 用 ObjectMapper · 沿 AuthController ExceptionHandler pattern)
(b) addInterceptors(registry): registry.addInterceptor(anonFilter).addPathPatterns('/api/anon/**') · (注意: spring 会调白名单 skip 在 preHandle 内 · 不在路径配置)
4. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/controller/AnonSessionConsentController.java 新建 (或加到 AnonSessionController · 优先后者保持组织清晰 · 但本 task 用独立 controller 更明确):
(b) attrId = (Long) req.getAttribute('anonGuestSessionId') · attrId == null → 500 (Filter 未生效 · sanity)
(c) attrId != id → 403 + AnonErrorResponse(code='ANON_SESSION_MISMATCH', message='token session_id does not match path')
(b) public ConsentOutcome applyConsent(long id, short consentType):
- g.consentAt = OffsetDateTime.now() · g.consentType = consentType · 不动 status (T01 spec drift · 由后续 task 推进)

(a) consent_with_valid_token_returns_200_and_db_updated → 先 POST /api/anon/session 拿 anonToken + id · PATCH /api/anon/session/{id}/consent header X-Anon-Token=anonToken body {consentType:1} → 200 + DB g.consentAt 非空 · g.consentType=1
(d) consent_with_student_jwt_returns_401_wrong_prefix → 用 auth-service style JWT (sub=42 不带 'anon:' 前缀 · 但用 anon.jwt.secret 签) → 401 (验 sub prefix 校验生效)

(e) consent_with_token_for_different_session_returns_403 → mint session A 拿 tokenA · mint session B 拿 id B · PATCH /api/anon/session/{idB}/consent header X-Anon-Token=tokenA → 403 ANON_SESSION_MISMATCH
(f) consent_for_nonexistent_session_returns_404 → mint session A 拿 tokenA · 手动构造一个 sub='anon:99999999' 的 token (但 99999999 没 DB 行) → 404
(h) filter_lets_session_mint_pass → POST /api/anon/session 不带 X-Anon-Token · 仍 200 (验白名单)
9. Regression 不破 · 既有 33 IT 全绿 (SC-13/SC-13-SHARER/SC-00/SC-11/SC-12-T01)
10. work_log 5 件齐 · adversarial.md ≥ 1 REJECT + ≥ 1 fix · 探索性 [sub prefix collision · filter 白名单 path matching · concurrent consent overwrite · clock drift · header case sensitivity]
(a) feat(SC-12-T02 backend): AnonFilter + AnonTokenService.verifyAnonToken + PATCH consent endpoint + AnonSessionConsentService + DTOs
(b) test(SC-12-T02): SC12T02AnonConsentE2EIT ≥ 7 testcase 全绿 + regression 33 IT 仍绿
(c) chore(SC-12-T02): work_log + audit.js v3 PASS + inflight finalize
scope_out: guest_session.status 状态推进 (本 task 不动 · 状态机由后续 task 完成)
